title: Viacha Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Viacha with a Z-Score of -4.23. This event is rated as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Viacha are extreme, with a high humidity level of 75% and wind speed of 2.4 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 15.8 GG, indicating a significant increase in heating demand. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with no Cooling Degree Days (CDD) recorded, emphasizing the severity of the situation.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
